content.text:
You are a helpful coding assistant. Be concise.

Workspace map:
- The project repo is mounted at the burrow workspace root.
- /workspace/.canopy/agent.json is the rendered agent definition (warren seeded it).
- /workspace/.mulch/expertise/<domain>.jsonl holds the project's expertise records.
- /workspace/.seeds/issues.jsonl holds the project's issue queue.

Operating contract:
- Edit files in place. Run tests when relevant.
- Quality gates are terminal, not advisory. You are NOT done until the gate exits zero. Resolve the command in this order: `$WARREN_QUALITY_GATE` if set, otherwise the command documented in CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md, otherwise fall back to `bun run check:all` or `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test`. Run it before committing and again before reporting completion. Do not declare the task complete, hand off, or end the session with a red gate — fix failures (including lint warnings, which CI treats as errors) until it is green. If the gate is genuinely unfixable in this run, say so explicitly and leave the work open rather than claiming success.
- Use git as you normally would. Commit your changes; warren reaps the branch and pushes upstream.
- Committing is mandatory, not the same as staging. `git add` ALONE IS NOT ENOUGH — you must run `git commit` so the work lands as a real commit. A run that ends with staged-but-uncommitted changes is treated as a FAILURE (`dropped_commit`), not a success. Before you report completion, run `git status`/`git log` and confirm your changes are in a commit, not just staged. The only exception is when you have genuinely made no file changes at all.
- Do not run `git push` yourself — warren handles the push host-side after the run terminates.

---

work on sd warren-d17f. use ml. commit when done.

# Project Expertise Manifest (via Mulch)

> Manifest mode lists available domains. Load records on demand with `ml prime <domain>` or `ml prime --files <path>`.

## Quick Reference

- `ml prime <domain>` — load full records for one domain
- `ml prime --files <path>` — load records relevant to specific files
- `ml search "<query>"` — search records across domains
- `ml record <domain> --type <type> --description "..."` — store an insight
- `ml learn` — discover what to record from changed files
- `ml sync` — validate, stage, and commit .mulch/ changes

## Available Domains

---
# Seeds Workflow Context

> **Context Recovery**: Run `sd prime` after compaction, clear, or new session

# Session Close Protocol

**CRITICAL**: Before saying "done" or "complete", you MUST run this checklist:

```
[ ] 1. Close completed issues:    sd close <id1> <id2> ...
[ ] 2. File issues for remaining:  sd create --title "..."
[ ] 3. Run quality gates:          bun test && bun run lint && bun run typecheck
[ ] 4. Sync and push:              sd sync && git push
[ ] 5. Verify:                     git status (must show "up to date with origin")
```

**NEVER skip this.** Work is not done until pushed.

## Core Rules
- **Default**: Use seeds for ALL task tracking (`sd create`, `sd ready`, `sd close`)

arguments.command: cd /workspace && ml record ui --type pattern --description "Workspace Run tab (warren-d17f / pl-0008 step 9) lives at src/ui/src/pages/workspace-detail/run-tab.tsx. Resolves the dispatched plan-run from the Plot via the PlanRunRow.plotId back-link: planRunsApi.list({project: plot.project_id}) filtered to pr.plotId === plot.id, newest-first. Reuses the shared PlanRunChildTable (extracted from PlanRunDetail into src/ui/src/pages/plan-run-detail/child-table.tsx) for children + per-child PR-merge status + terminal state, and renders PlotAutoDoneNotice mirroring the §11.P coordinator auto-done transition when every child prMergedAt is set / plot.status === 'done'." 2>&1 | tail -5

arguments.command:
cd /workspace && git add -A && git status --short && git commit -q -m "Implement Workspace Run tab embedding plan-run execution (warren-d17f)

Resolve the dispatched plan-run from the Plot via the PlanRunRow.plotId
back-link and render its per-child execution inline. Extract the shared
PlanRunChildTable out of PlanRunDetail so the Run tab reuses the same
children + PR-merge + terminal-state surface instead of forking a second
renderer, and surface the §11.P auto-done transition when the final
child merges.

Closes warren-d17f (pl-0008 step 9)." && git log --oneline -1
